title: Nanu Devaralla Nanna Athma Devaru
desc: This is TV Show - Religious Category.

title: Bandhana
desc: Harish, a doctor, falls in love with Nandini, his student. However, he slips into depression when he confesses his feelings for her and learns that she is marrying her childhood friend, Balu.

title: Jessie
desc: Nandini, a young doctor, falls in love with Jessie, a happy-go-lucky man. But when Nandini gets married to Shyam Prasad at her parents' insistence, Jessie comes back in her life as a ghost.

title: Golibar
desc: Kapali, a corrupt politician forces his rule on the city, and until Arjun, a police officer takes over as the in charge of the region and makes him pay.

title: Love Madi Nodu
desc: Dr Anand marries Sandhya, who is in love with an aspiring music director, Manjunath. Anand promises to unite the lovers but asks Sandhya to stay with him for a week.

title: Sarvasva
desc: When two friends set off to make their celluloid dream into a reality, they encounter various obstacles and a visually impaired woman who changes their lives forever.
